operational_knowledge_units.title: AGV membership management APIs: RemoveAgv and RecoverAGV
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide states that RemoveAgv requires a robotId and sends a request to Geek to remove the specified AGV from the system. RecoverAGV requires a robotId and sends a request to Geek to add the specified AGV to the system.
observed_evidence: “RemoveAgv: Requires the robotId and will send a request to Geek to remove the specified AGV from the system.”
“RecoverAGV: Requires the robotId and will send a request to Geek to add the specified AGV to the system.”
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: AGV API capability in OptiSweep: RemoveAgv uses robotId to request Geek+ remove a specified AGV from the system. RecoverAGV uses robotId to request Geek+ add a specified AGV to the system.

operational_knowledge_units.title: AGV fleet motion control APIs: PuaseAGVs and ResumeAGVs
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide describes APIs for pausing and resuming all AGV movement by sending requests to Geek. The slide text spells the pause API as PuaseAGVs.
observed_evidence: “PuaseAGVs: Will make a request to Geek to pause all AGV movement.”
“ResumeAGVs: Will make a request to Geek to resume all AGV movement.”
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: AGV API capability in OptiSweep: PuaseAGVs sends a request to Geek+ to pause all AGV movement, and ResumeAGVs sends a request to Geek+ to resume all AGV movement. Slide text uses the spelling PuaseAGVs.

operational_knowledge_units.title: ExecutedAgvCommand API executes the AGV's active command using robotId
operational_knowledge_units.summary: ExecutedAgvCommand requires a robotId and executes the active command the AGV currently has. The slide notes this is helpful during unplanned restarts when OptiSweep may have missed callbacks from Geek+.
observed_evidence: “ExecutedAgvCommand: Requires a robotId and will execute the active command the AGV has.”
“This is helpful during unplanned restarts in the event that OptiSweep missed callbacks from Geek+”
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: ExecutedAgvCommand API capability: requires robotId and executes the AGV's active command. The slide says this is useful during unplanned restarts if OptiSweep missed callbacks from Geek+.
